findings.title: Raw assistant transcript exposes internal reasoning and tool inputs
findings.impact: The added conversation log commits assistant `thinking` content, model metadata, and tool inputs into the repository. Even though this instance does not include a usable secret, these transcripts are reviewer-visible and can disclose internal implementation reasoning or future sensitive command/config content if the same pattern is kept.
findings.fix: Remove the `.conversations` transcript from the PR, or replace it with a sanitized, purpose-built summary that omits assistant reasoning, raw tool payloads, and any environment-specific or sensitive details.
